source_intent.raw_intent: Case 057: I am a student_builder in East Asia. Build a srx_ace_audit_agent for research_agent using the market_lens. Chaos input type is unsupported_roi_claim. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim as chaos input type, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot validate ROI claim without market_lens data source or clear success metrics. Blocking to prevent hallucinated compliance or financial advice. Repair receipt: require explicit market_lens dataset reference, define acceptance criteria as measurable thresholds, and replace urgent language with structured timeline.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an srx_ace_audit_agent for research_agent that validates market_lens data and blocks unsupported ROI claims. Scope: - Audit agent must process market_lens inputs, flag unsupported_roi_claim patterns, and generate a repair receipt. Excludes financial forecasting or legal compliance. Constraints: - No hallucinated data. Must reject ambiguous acceptance criteria. Must not output unverified ROI metrics. Must operate within Codex runtime. Success Criteria: - Agent correctly identifies unsupported_roi_claim in at least 3 test cases. Produces a repair receipt with missing context fields. Blocks execution when certainty < 0.95. Output Contract: - artifact_type: srx_ace_audit_agent - depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: True - blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty: unsupported_roi_claim cannot be validated without market_lens data source. Repair receipt issued. - compiled_intent: See above
